productDisplayName: Locomotive Men Plaid Black Checked Shirt
description: Composition100% cotton shirt with half sleeves, with plaid checks in black, grey and white, black stitch detailing, tape detailing on the in-seam of the collar, patch pocket on left chest with embroidered seal, rolled cuff with jersey panel detailing, full length buttoned placket and curved hemlineFittingSlimWash care Machine wash at 40 degree C Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry on normal or line dry Warm iron Get ready to take casual dressing to the next level with this plaid shirt from locomotive. The cool cotton fabric keeps you fresh all day while you hang out with your friends. This shirt can be teamed with low slung jeans and canvas shoes for a laidback look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
